name: Modifying Crontab
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Modifying Crontab
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious modification of crontab file.

False positives:
- Legitimate modification of crontab

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Modifying Crontab on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Pawel Mazur SIGMA Title: Modifying Crontab SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious modification of crontab file.  False positives: - Legitimate modification of crontab  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
